index.html
files.code:
Default palette

Standard palette1 — no accessibility mode set.

Color Blind Modes

Set via theme.accessibility.colorBlindMode. Each palette is designed to remain distinguishable under the named color vision deficiency.

Deuteranopia

Red-green (green-weak) · ~6% of males

Protanopia

Red-green (red-weak) · ~1% of males

Tritanopia

Blue-yellow · ~0.01% of population

High Contrast

Wider strokes · data labels always on
